description: Add orchestration that runs the same frozen eval dataset K times through the live eval path, writes distinct run artifacts, then invokes/reuses `evals/variance.py` to compute per-case mean/stddev, flaky cases, aggregate score variance, and suggested regression band. Define run labels/artifact layout and how the report or prompt-evals-run skill surfaces the variance summary. Keep `evals/variance.py` available as an offline CLI over existing `output.json` files. Origin: deferred from `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-eval-framework-hardening.md` live-path integration.
title: Live run-path K-run variance orchestration
